criticalRules: Preserve exact port styles from reference
objectsParameters MUST BE POPULATED with the SAME ScilabStrings as the function body Array in exprs (NOT an empty Array).
Second body string must be 'xd=[]' (not a space). Last ScilabString must have TWO lines: line 0=' ', line 1='y1=[]'.
Use y1=%e^(u1) for exponential equations (NOT y1=exp(u1)).
name: scifunc_block_m
